contentBlocks.original:
रामस्कन्धं हनुमन्तं वैनतेयं वृकोदरं
शयने यः स्मरेन्नित्यं दुःस्वप्नस्तस्य नश्यति
contentBlocks.transliteration:
rāmaskandhaṃ hanumantaṃ vainateyaṃ vṛkodaraṃ
śayane yaḥ smarennityaṃ duḥsvapnastasya naśyati
contentBlocks.translation: Praying to Lords Rama, Skanda (Subrahmanya), Hanumantha, Vainateya (Garuda), and Bhima before going to bed daily, ensures a peaceful sleep without disturbing dreams.
contentBlocks.meanings: रामस्कन्धं (rāmaskandhaṃ) – Rama and Skanda (rāma:Rama | skandhaṃ:Skanda); हनुमन्तं (hanumantaṃ) – Hanuman; वैनतेयं (vainateyaṃ) – Vainateya (Garuda); वृकोदरं (vṛkodaraṃ) – Bhima; शयने (śayane) – in bed; यः (yaḥ) – who; स्मरेत् (smaret) – remembers; नित्यं (nityaṃ) – daily; दुःस्वप्नः (duḥsvapnaḥ) – bad dreams; तस्य (tasya) – his; नश्यति (naśyati) – are destroyed;
